title: Boronia ramosa

intro: Boronia ramosa, also known as the 'Pink Boronia', is a fragrant, flowering shrub native to Australia. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia.
